templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We ship from Lancaster, PA.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/illcurrency/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/illcurrency/

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Ambassador program / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at support@illcurrency.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at orders@illcurrency.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 717-947-7883 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Do you offer Gift Cards?
templates.content: We sure do, check them out here: https://illcurrency.com/products/illcurrency-gift-card

templates.name: Track my order
templates.content: Sure thing, you can track your order here: https://illcurrency.com/pages/track-order

templates.name: First Responder / Military / Teacher / Medical
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can apply for your code here: https://verifypass.com/offers/website/illcurrency.com

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@illcurrency.com or give us a call at 717-947-7883. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here:  https://illcurrency.com/pages/returns and you can start your return/exchange here: https://illcurrency.attn.tv/aQttlQe9l0Ou

templates.name: Rewards and Points
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://illcurrency.com/pages/points-and-rewards

templates.name: How long is your express processing shipping time?
templates.content: That would ensure your order ships the same day or next business day for a 2-3 day delivery.

templates.name: I just placed an order. Can I upgrade it to get faster shipping?
templates.content: You can use the link for faster shipping: https://illcurrency.attn.tv/sl/x1Ko4cDk

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! I'd recommend taking a look at our size chart on each product page. If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time usually takes 2-5 business days and once shipped it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: How do I redeem my points?
templates.content: Click the illCurrency Loyalty Program button on the lower right-hand corner of our website to be taken to your Loyalty Program homepage (please remember to log in!). There, you can choose to redeem your points for coupons or other discounts valid towards a future purchase.

templates.name: Where are you located?
templates.content: We are a custom clothing brand located at 341 East Liberty Street, Lancaster, PA 17602.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://illcurrency.com/pages/size-charts

templates.name: Cancel Order
templates.content: The best way to check if you can cancel or edit your order is to email us directly at support@illcurrency.com or give us a call at 717-947-7883. Our team is happy to help!
